ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the song in minutes and seconds */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the song */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was last updated */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the song (e.g., draft, in production, released) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was released */,
  "platform_spotify_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the song on Spotify */,
  "platform_apple_music_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the song on Apple Music */,
  "platform_youtube_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the song on YouTube */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songwriters" (
  "songwriter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each songwriter */,
  "songwriter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the songwriter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the songwriter */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the songwriter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the songwriter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the songwriter */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Standard rate for contributions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("songwriter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the producer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the producer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the producer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the producer */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Standard rate for contributions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the contribution is for */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor (songwriter or producer) */,
  "contributor_type" TEXT /* Type of contributor (songwriter or producer) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., lyrics, melody, arrangement) */,
  "contribution_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the contribution */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the contribution (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES songwriters ("songwriter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_contributions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song version */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the song */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about this version of the song */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, final) */,
  "contributor_notes" TEXT /* Notes from contributors for this version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path for accessing the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_versions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "royalty_distribution" (
  "royalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each royalty payment */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the royalties are for */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor receiving the royalties */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of royalties received by the contributor */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Actual amount paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("royalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_royalty_distribution_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_royalty_distribution_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES songwriters ("songwriter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_royalty_distribution_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)
